iti58:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti58:2.3: Craving for sensuality, craving for becoming, craving for non-becoming.
iti58:3.1: Bound with the bondage of craving,
iti58:3.2: their minds smitten with becoming & non-,
iti58:3.3: they are bound with the bondage of Māra–
iti58:3.4: people with no safety from bondage,
iti58:4.2: free from the craving for becoming & non-, reaching the ending of effluents,
iti58:4.3: though in the world, have gone beyond.
